userOutcome: When profile allows, review starts automatically after review-readiness and ship starts automatically after review passes. No manual /review or /ship needed for high-autonomy profiles.
scopeSummary: Add auto-review and auto-ship paths to dispatcher tick. Auto-review: invoke write_review() + auto-complete stages from automated verdict when profile_auto_review=true. Auto-ship: invoke start_ship + build_ship_draft when profile_auto_ship=true. Surface profile policy in work order automation state. Post-ship cleanup as best-effort patrol finding.
risks: Auto-review skips human judgment — mitigated by profile gating (only high-autonomy profiles opt in)
Auto-ship git operations (stage/commit/push) stay outside dispatcher — draft is prepared but not executed
readinessReason: All building blocks exist: profile hooks implemented, write_review() generates automated verdict, ship_draft.py generates full draft, state machines handle transitions. Only wiring needed.
handoffSummary: In dispatcher tick: after auto-plan, check lanes where review_readiness=ready and profile_auto_review=true → call write_review(), auto-complete stages, set verdict. Check lanes where ship.status=ready and profile_auto_ship=true → call start_ship(), build_ship_draft(), store in automation state. Surface profile policy in work_order._automation_state(). Post-ship cleanup as patrol finding.
